note: Bundle root gate-report. Per-leaf evidence lives in set_app_theme/ sub-directory. set_app_theme: owner@0x14091bc60 (0x6f4B=1780B, 57 BBs, 16 wind_states); Win IDA fully decompiled; dim1-5 closed; dim6 missing. 2026-06-05 <audit-session> ADDITIVE: theme_platform_diff leaf added (mac-vs-win cross-platform verdict; logic set_app_theme/logic/THEME-PLATFORM-DIFF-109-DISTILLED.md) — does not alter set_app_theme ceiling. 2026-06-05 <audit-session> ADDITIVE: theme_platform_diff genuine_unclosed (mac set_theme persist?) CLOSED as genuine_no_persist (mac command body 0x1000fa294 apply-only, no settings write) — moved to closed_findings; ceiling unchanged.

theme_platform_diff.verdict: theme = shell-layer apply (set_app_theme, all-window, upstream Tauri, identical both platforms) + win program-layer persist (set_theme -> settings.json, byte-confirmed win owner 0x1408adf90); OS light/dark follow is macOS-ONLY (tao get_ns_theme@0x100babed8 + KVO AppleInterfaceThemeChangedNotification chain); WIN backend does NOT read OS theme (uxtheme entirely absent, no ShouldAppsUseLightTheme, no DwmGetColorizationColor); mica/tabbed = Win11-only window-material names but NOT wired to any DWM material API in 1.0.9 (theme command call tree cannot reach DWM cluster 0x140e5xxxx).
theme_platform_diff.source_impl_guidance: source archive win does NOT need to add OS-theme reading to match 1.0.9 (genuine win binary reads no OS light/dark; theme driven solely by frontend-supplied theme string). Adding ShouldAppsUseLightTheme on win would be NEW behavior, not upstream parity. mica/tabbed need no DWM material wiring to match 1.0.9 (inert named enum members upstream).

closed_findings.method: xrefs_to AppHandle::set_theme@0x100347e08 -> single caller = inlined window-plugin command future body 0x1000fa294; full decompile shows callee set = from_command x2 -> AppHandle::set_theme (send SetTheme code 35) -> alloc 128B 'null' response -> InvokeResolver::return_result; NO save_config_text / settings_persist / fs write
closed_findings.verdict: mac set_theme is pure upstream @tauri-apps window-plugin command (apply-only, no persist); win set_theme persist (owner 0x1408adf90 -> settings_persist_write_sys 0x140864220) is a win-only source archive program-layer addition; mac apply-only is genuine 1.0.9 behavior

theme_platform_diff.note: Caller-chain/platform-diff verdict; not a per-leaf full_leaf_100 closure of the win set_theme command (that lives in set_app_theme leaf for set_app_theme; set_theme win persist owner 0x1408adf90 referenced, not separately gated here).
